title: 7.3 and 7.4 practice
description: Practice what you learned in lessons 7.3 and 7.4.

assessment_items.question_content:
**With today’s technology, how long would it take an astronaut from Earth to reach Mars?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Why does the current travel time to Mars concern NASA scientists?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Long spaceflights can cause vision problems in astronauts.
Astronauts might run out of food in two days.
Spacecraft could get lost because Mars moves too fast.
Astronauts might forget how to breathe normal air.

assessment_items.question_content:
** How does gravity on Mars compare to gravity on Earth?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Mars has only about 38% of Earth’s gravity.
Mars has exactly the same gravity as Earth.
Mars has no gravity at all.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What are some of the challenges people might face living on Mars?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Little atmosphere, radiation exposure, and dust storms
